commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a shared predicate to drop `stopReason: "length"` assistant turns that contain only hidden reasoning from embedded and transport replay, with regression tests, live-test coverage changes, and transcript-hygiene docs.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +179, Docs +16. Total +244 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current `main` keeps reasoning-only `length` assistant turns in replay, while the PR adds tests and a shared predicate to drop that exact shape. I did not execute the test suite in this read-only review.
